title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.803 - Ineligibility based on conflict of interest, when
text:
135.803.  Ineligibility based on conflict of interest, when. — A taxpayer shall not be deemed ineligible for any state tax credit program in effect or hereinafter established on the basis that there exists a conflict of interest due to a relationship of any degree or affinity to any statewide elected official or member of the general assembly, when the person of relation holds less than a two percent equity interest in the taxpayer.
(L. 2008 H.B. 2058)
